name: Braised Chicken in Dijon Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 boned and skinned chicken breast halves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet with high sides, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Sear the chicken breast halves in hot oil for about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
3. Reduce heat to medium. Add onion and garlic; cook for a few more minutes until lightly browned.
4. Add wine and scrape any brown bits from the pan's bottom.
5. Return chicken to the center of the pan, keeping it evenly spaced.
6. Pour in chicken stock, adding salt and pepper. Ensure stock covers only about half the chicken pieces.
7. Bring to a simmer and reduce heat to low. Partially cover the pan; braise for one hour, turning chicken once or twice near the end.
8. Remove chicken and keep warm. Add Dijon mustard and cream to the pan.
9. Raise heat to medium and boil sauce until desired thickness is reached.
10. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Serve chicken with the warm sauce.
